04TJ Holowaychuk
Node.js Contributor

SCOUTING REPORT

TJ Holowaychuk is a pivotal figure in the Node.js community, known for his innovative frameworks and modules. His work has significantly shaped web development practices and tools, making him a respected leader in open source.

SIGNATURE PROJECTS

  • Express
  • Koa
  • Socket.IO
  • Mocha
